description: QuickBooks Online OAuth 2.0 credentials for REST API v3 integration.

ClientId.title: Client ID
ClientId.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from your Intuit Developer app.

ClientSecret.title: Client Secret
ClientSecret.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from your Intuit Developer app.

RealmId.title: Realm ID (Company ID)
RealmId.description: QuickBooks company identifier. Found in Settings > Account and Settings or in the URL when logged in.

AccessToken.title: Access Token
AccessToken.description: OAuth 2.0 access token. Automatically refreshed by the connector when expired.

RefreshToken.title: Refresh Token
RefreshToken.description: OAuth 2.0 refresh token used to obtain new access tokens. Valid for 100 days.

Environment.title: Environment
Environment.description: QuickBooks environment: sandbox for development, production for live data.
